title: Delicious Jamaican Sweet Potato Casserole
description: A kid-friendly Jamaican dish featuring sweet potatoes, this casserole is a perfect blend of bitter and velvety flavors. It is a great option for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the sliced sweet potatoes and brown sugar.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the melted butter, heavy cream, salt, black pepper, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
Add the fast action yeast and ferment-jang to the wet ingredients and whisk until well combined.
Pour the wet ingredients over the sweet potatoes and toss until they are evenly coated.
Transfer the sweet potato mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake the casserole for 45 minutes, or until the sweet potatoes are tender.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
